title: Claim Manifest CSV Contract
description: Machine-readable contract for claim_manifest.csv rows. This schema describes row objects after CSV parsing.

source_data.description: Package-relative path(s), separated by semicolons when multiple files support the claim.

raw_record.description: Package-relative raw record path(s), separated by semicolons.

analysis_code.description: Package-relative analysis code, notebook, or script path(s), separated by semicolons.

protocol.description: Package-relative protocol, sample map, batch map, or methods record path(s), separated by semicolons.

status.description: Recommended values: ready, needs_review, missing_materials, or not_applicable.
